title: The Scheduled Areas (Assimilation of Laws) Act, 1953
full_text: The Scheduled Areas (Assimilation of Laws) Act, 1953 अनुसूचित क्षेत्र (विधियों की एकरूपता) अधिनियम, 1953 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1953-16 Act Number: 16 Enactment Date: 1953-05-06 Act Year: 1953 Short Title: The Scheduled Areas (Assimilation of Laws) Act, 1953 Hindi Title: अनुसूचित क्षेत्र (विधियों की एकरूपता) अधिनियम, 1953 Long Title: An Act to assimilate certain laws in force in the scheduled areas to the laws in force in the districts of Nowgong and Sibsagar in the State of Assam. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 01-09-1953 Notification: 1st September, 1953, vide Notification No. S. R.O. 1624, dated 26th August, 1953, see Gazette of India, Part II, sec. 3. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Scheduled Areas (Assimilation of Laws) Act, 1953 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Assimilation of laws. Section 4. Transitional provisions. Section 5. Savings. Section 6. Provision for removal of difficulties. Schedule 1.
